title: Update mtrmac/gpgme vendor to fix build on CentOS 7
body:
This contains:
- https://github.com/mtrmac/gpgme/commit/3a6e25fe9998e44270053bd2562dae117c614efd , a straightforward build fix
- https://github.com/mtrmac/gpgme/commit/c2302e1b78cadab51d73d0250a672f09e4830134 , fixing an important memory management error first noticed on CentOS 7.
